creator: issei@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
>Submitter-Id:   current-users
>Originator:     Issei Suzuki
>Organization:   Personal
>Confidential:   no
>Synopsis:       Update ports: japanese/tcsh and related stuff.
>Severity:       non-critical
>Priority:       low
>Category:       ports
>Release:        FreeBSD 2.2.7-STABLE i386
>Class:          change-request
>Environment: 

	

>Description: 

PR ports/8152 is obsolute because new version of tcsh has been released. 
This is a substitute of PR ports/8152.

Update ports japanese/tcsh and related stuff.

     1. Change base tcsh version to tcsh 6.08.00. Tcsh 6.08.00 is a first
        official (not beta) release since tcsh 6.07.02 has been released.
     2. Change MASTER_SITES and DISTFILES section about NLS catalogs because
        original package distributer has changed.

>How-To-Repeat: 

	

>Fix: 
	
Apply the following patch to the ports-current.

begin 644 tcsh.diff.gz
